commit_message: docs: BAR-126 — OPERATOR_PROFILE.md v4 Block 6 three-tier enforcement
changes: Block 6 updated with four convergent fixes from Round 3 attack surface analysis: (1) three-tier enforcement model, (2) all gates fire on every response, (3) max 3 rewrite attempts then escalate, (4) principle-based Gate 2 rejection.
notes: Payload written verbatim from sys/runtime/inbox/orchestrator/BAR-126_OPERATOR_PROFILE_v4_payload.md. No modifications. Dave pushes after review.
